000.reason: Raised irises, lower globe exposure, and upward head pitch.

090.reason: Irises shift screen-right with matching nose, muzzle, and cheek yaw.

180.reason: Lowered irises, upper globe exposure, and downward head pitch.

270.reason: Irises shift screen-left with opposing nose, muzzle, and cheek yaw.

review_warnings: Two of three isolated blind reviewers classified both cardinal axes as ambiguous; the third confirmed verticals but not the horizontal hard gate.
